alerts.title: 18 critical threats in active window
alerts.description: Detected 18 critical-severity (9.5+/10) threats within the hunting window. Elevated threat landscape detected. SOC should operate at heightened alert status.
indicators: The game is over: when “free” comes at too high a price. Wha
ClawSec: Hardening OpenClaw Agents from the Inside Out
Please Don’t Feed the Scattered Lapsus ShinyHunters
recommended_actions: Elevate SOC to heightened alert status
Review all critical signals for organizational exposure
Accelerate patching cycles for critical vulnerabilities
Brief CISO/executive leadership on threat landscape

alerts.title: Activity surge detected for UNC-CDB-99
alerts.description: Threat actor UNC-CDB-99 appeared in 38 signals. Targeted sectors: multiple. Campaign escalation probable.
recommended_actions: Hunt for UNC-CDB-99 TTPs in SIEM/EDR telemetry
Review all IOCs associated with UNC-CDB-99
Increase monitoring sensitivity for targeted sectors
Prepare incident response playbook for actor profile
